name: Russian Mustard
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the dry mustard and cold water to form a stiff paste.
2. Use a rubber spatula to smooth down the mixture.
3. Pour 1/2 cup of boiling water over the mustard; do not stir. Let the water sit on top. Allow it to cool, then carefully pour off the water. Repeat this process with another 1/2 cup of boiling water and again with the last 1/2 cup.
4. Once all the water has been poured off and cooled, whisk in the sugar, vinegar, oil, and salt. Blend well.
5. Transfer the mixture to a well-sealed container and allow it to stand overnight before using.
Makes 1 1/4 cups.
